% Auto-generated source-truth intake stub for ID11386.
\tzpentry{ID11386}{Dynamic Dark-Energy Breathing Function}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The dynamic pressure contribution is encoded by an exponential integral over one plus the equation-of-state function.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
F(a)=\exp\left(3\int_{a}^{1}\frac{1+w(a')}{a'}\,da'\right)
\paragraph{Registry Metadata.}
UUID: \texttt{ca4dc2cf-6f3d-5229-a318-081be6028bd8}. PiID: \texttt{PiID-11386-portal-breathing}. LOC: \texttt{QC - Physics}. arXiv: \texttt{physics.gen-ph}.
